Class SVGTransform.SVGScale

java.lang.Object
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.svg.type.ValueBase
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.svg.type.SVGTransform
org.tquadrat.foundation.javadoc.internal.foundation.svg.type.SVGTransform.SVGScale
Enclosing class:
SVGTransform
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: SVGTransform.java 977 2022-01-06 11:41:03Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.0.5") public static final class SVGTransform.SVGScale extends SVGTransform
The SVG scale transformation.

This transform definition specifies a scale operation by x and y. This is the equivalent to 
matrix(x 0 0 y 0 0)
. If y is not provided, it is assumed to be equal to x.
Author:
Thomas Thrien - thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org
Version:
$Id: SVGTransform.java 977 2022-01-06 11:41:03Z tquadrat $
Since:
0.0.5
